svg.title: Interactive Back Muscle Anatomy Map - ChunkItUp.com
svg.desc: Anatomical diagram showing 27 major muscle groups of the human back, including trapezius, latissimus dorsi, erector spinae, deltoids, triceps, glutes, hamstrings, and calves. Click any muscle to select it for exercise targeting. Each muscle is labeled with its anatomical name, function, and recommended exercises for training.

path.aria-label: Head and Neck - Head movement and stability
path.data-muscle-exercises: neck stretches, head rotations
path.data-keywords: head neck cervical spine movement

path.aria-label: Upper Trapezius - Shoulder elevation and neck support
path.data-muscle-exercises: shrugs, upright rows, overhead press
path.data-keywords: trapezius upper back shoulders neck shrugs

path.aria-label: Trapezius - Shoulder blade movement and upper back stability
path.data-muscle-function: Shoulder blade movement and upper back stability
path.data-muscle-exercises: rows, deadlifts, face pulls, shrugs
path.data-keywords: trapezius back shoulder blade retraction scapula

path.aria-label: Infraspinatus - External shoulder rotation and stability
path.data-muscle-exercises: external rotations, face pulls, band pull-aparts
path.data-keywords: infraspinatus rotator cuff shoulder stability external rotation

path.aria-label: Teres Major - Shoulder extension and internal rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: pull-ups, lat pulldowns, rows
path.data-keywords: teres major shoulder extension lat pulldown rows

path.aria-label: Posterior Deltoid - Shoulder extension and external rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: reverse flyes, face pulls, bent-over rows, rear delt raises
path.data-keywords: posterior deltoid rear delts shoulders back

path.aria-label: Middle Deltoid - Shoulder abduction
path.data-muscle-exercises: lateral raises, overhead press, upright rows
path.data-keywords: middle deltoid lateral delts shoulders abduction

path.aria-label: Triceps Brachii (Lateral and Long Head) - Elbow extension and shoulder stability
path.data-muscle-exercises: close-grip bench press, overhead extensions, dips, pushdowns
path.data-keywords: triceps arms elbow extension pressing

path.aria-label: Triceps Brachii (Medial Head) - Elbow extension
path.data-muscle-exercises: reverse grip pushdowns, close-grip press, dips
path.data-keywords: triceps medial head arms extension

path.aria-label: Extensor Carpi Ulnaris - Wrist extension and ulnar deviation
path.data-muscle-exercises: wrist extensions, reverse curls, farmer carries
path.data-keywords: forearm wrist extensor grip strength

path.aria-label: Flexor Carpi Ulnaris - Wrist flexion and grip strength
path.data-muscle-exercises: wrist curls, farmer carries, dead hangs
path.data-keywords: forearm wrist flexor grip strength

path.aria-label: Brachioradialis - Elbow flexion and forearm rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: hammer curls, reverse curls, rows
path.data-keywords: brachioradialis forearm elbow flexion grip

path.aria-label: Hands - Grip and fine motor control
path.data-muscle-exercises: grip trainers, dead hangs, farmer carries
path.data-keywords: hands fingers grip strength forearm

path.aria-label: Latissimus Dorsi - Shoulder adduction, extension, and internal rotation
path.data-muscle-function: Shoulder adduction, extension, and internal rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: pull-ups, chin-ups, lat pulldowns, rows, deadlifts
path.data-keywords: latissimus dorsi lats back width pull-ups rowing

path.aria-label: Erector Spinae - Spinal extension and posture maintenance
path.data-muscle-exercises: deadlifts, back extensions, good mornings, hyperextensions
path.data-keywords: erector spinae lower back spine posture deadlift

path.aria-label: Gluteus Medius - Hip abduction and pelvic stability
path.data-muscle-exercises: hip abductions, clamshells, side-lying leg raises, single-leg squats
path.data-keywords: gluteus medius glutes hip stability abduction

path.aria-label: Gluteus Maximus - Hip extension and external rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: squats, deadlifts, hip thrusts, lunges, step-ups
path.data-keywords: gluteus maximus glutes hip extension squats deadlifts

path.aria-label: Vastus Lateralis - Knee extension
path.data-muscle-exercises: squats, leg press, lunges, leg extensions
path.data-keywords: vastus lateralis quadriceps knee extension squats

path.aria-label: Biceps Femoris - Knee flexion and hip extension
path.data-muscle-exercises: leg curls, Romanian deadlifts, good mornings, Nordic curls
path.data-keywords: biceps femoris hamstrings knee flexion leg curl

path.aria-label: Semitendinosus - Knee flexion and hip extension
path.data-muscle-exercises: leg curls, Romanian deadlifts, glute-ham raises
path.data-keywords: semitendinosus hamstrings knee flexion hip extension

path.aria-label: Adductor Magnus - Hip adduction and extension
path.data-muscle-exercises: adductor machine, sumo squats, side lunges
path.data-keywords: adductor magnus inner thigh hip adduction

path.aria-label: Gracilis - Hip adduction and knee flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: leg curls, adductor exercises, side lunges
path.data-keywords: gracilis inner thigh hip adduction knee flexion

path.aria-label: Soleus - Ankle plantar flexion (bent knee)
path.data-muscle-exercises: seated calf raises, calf press, walking
path.data-keywords: soleus calves ankle plantar flexion calf raises

path.aria-label: Gastrocnemius - Ankle plantar flexion and knee flexion
path.data-muscle-function: Ankle plantar flexion and knee flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: standing calf raises, jump rope, box jumps
path.data-keywords: gastrocnemius calves ankle flexion calf raises jumping

path.aria-label: Feet - Balance, stability, and propulsion
path.data-muscle-exercises: toe raises, balance exercises, barefoot training
path.data-keywords: feet foot muscles balance stability ankle

svg.script: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"AnatomicalStructure","name":"Human Back Muscle Anatomy","image":"https://chunkitup.com/svg/Back.svg","description":"Interactive anatomical diagram of the human back body muscles including trapezius, lats, glutes, and more.","associatedPathophysiology":"Back pain, strain, posture issues","subStructure":[]}
